comments.body: I think we should also backport this: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/29049

> I think we should also backport this: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/29049

yes but well that needs a container-libs backport + release over there first, which is out of scope for this PR. I just want to make sure we can the easy clean cherry-picks in first.
